TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tafalong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,007 buwan, 2,958 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 2,609 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 349 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis8 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. qalang Tafalong ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 kyokay. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga Sado. tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga Atomo. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga Laso'ay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ta*aloŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu koŇčő≤u …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē* *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj Ēzil na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. qalaŇč ta*aloŇč …£a maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. qalaŇč ta*aloŇč …£a maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. qalaŇč ta*aloŇč …£a maki * Ňčas~…ēal s~…ēexu. qalaŇč ta*aloŇč …£a maki * kjokaj. taj mkjańßu Ē na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēa*o. taj Ēllaw na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a atomo. taj Ēzil na ta*aloŇč ńßja Ē …£a las~…ēo Ēaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tafalong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,007 buwan, 2,958 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 2,609 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 349 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis8 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafalong hya' ga llyung. qalang Tafalong ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Tafalong ga maki 1 kyokay. tay mkyahu' na Tafalong hya' ga Sado. tay 'llaw na Tafalong hya' ga Atomo. tay 'zil na Tafalong hya' ga Laso'ay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
